title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Bank LIC CSL Co-branded Eclat Select Credit Card is designed to open the doors of an unmatched experience powered by exciting offers and innovative financial solutions. This card brings to you unparalleled privileges to suit your lifestyle and preferences both in India and abroad. 
This card is being offered with no joining fees, so hurry up! Call our Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest LIC branch. 
The digitized Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC) in a downloadable PDF format. 
The Co-branded Eclat Select Credit Card understands your lifestyle and rewards you for your needs. You will earn 4 Delight Points for every Rs. 100 spent by you using your Eclat Credit Card. So enjoy extra rewards on travelling, shopping, dine-out or watching movies! Get rewarded for all your spends! Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
  * 1,000 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 5,000 or more within 30 days of card activation.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.
  * Additional milestone benefit of 2,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 4 lakhs.


***Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories**
Enjoy Interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due. 
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using Eclat Select Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of Rs. 400 to Rs. 5000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family. 
Accidental Death and Permanent Disability: Cover of Rs. 10.00 lakh in case of loss of life or permanent disability due to accident. Credit Shield Cover: Outstanding Dues as on the date of death. 
Criteria:Age -18 years to 70 years Card Usage - One successful financial or non-financial transaction at any channel is done in the last 90 days prior to the incident. 
Enjoy luxury at select airport lounges in India. No matter which airline or class you fly, your Eclat Select card offers you well deserved rest and use of facilities. You will surely find it useful to relieve travel fatigue and escape airport chaos. The airport lounge access is being provided by RuPay and is subject to change as per RuPay’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice. For the list of participating Lounges please 
Per quarter period would be considered from 15th of the month i.e. Jan 15 - Apr 15, Apr 15 - Jul 15, Jul 15 - Oct 15 and Oct 15 - Jan 15.
Get more freedom with your Eclat Select Credit Card. You can use it at over 5.81 million merchants in India and over 44 million merchants abroad. 
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Credit Card Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank. 
You may apply for upto 2 add-on cards for your family members.

Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - Non Toll Free - (24x7 service)
